text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm Oguri Cap. ...Nice to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've got a lot of folks cheering me on back home.
And... I want to make them proud.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
To do that, I have to eat more and try really hard.
...Hmm. All this talking's made me hungry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
